{"name":"DehumidifierSetDryingMode","cron":"","period":0,"code":"wait until ((#RainSensor).rainsensor_rain == true)
wait until ((#WeatherProvider).weatherprovider_weather != "rain")
(#Dehumidifier).dehumidifier_setdehumidifiermode("drying")
(#Speaker).speaker_speak("제습기가 건조 모드로 작동합니다")"}
